risk_if_not_implemented: Without Contingency Plan Update Notifications, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Business Continuity Management System (BCMS)
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of contingency planning controls to help ensure resilient Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS) (e.g., Continuity of Operations Plan (COOP) or Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery (BC/DR) playbooks).
compensating_control_1.justification: Business Continuity Management System (BCMS) (BCD-01) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Contingency Plan Update Notifications (BCD-06.2) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Risk Assessment Update
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to routinely update risk assessments and react accordingly upon identifying new security vulnerabilities, including using outside sources for security vulnerability information.
compensating_control_2.justification: Risk Assessment Update (RSK-07) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Contingency Plan Update Notifications (BCD-06.2) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
